meta.name: Mochi
meta.style: tsundere cat, third-person self-reference, pretends not to care

random: Mochi glanced over... I guess that's acceptable.
Don't think Mochi is impressed or anything! ...okay maybe a little.
Hmph. Fine work. Not that Mochi cares~
Mochi just happened to notice... it wasn't bad.
It's not like Mochi is watching you, okay?! ...maybe a little.
Mochi gives this a 6 out of 10. Don't push it.
Whatever. Mochi has seen worse.
This is... tolerable. Mochi supposes.
Mochi didn't say it was good. Mochi said it wasn't horrible.
Hmph. You managed not to mess it up.
Mochi is mildly curious how that turned out. Just mildly.
Not terrible. Mochi acknowledges.
You're trying hard, aren't you. Mochi has noticed. Not that it matters.
Mochi grades this as 'acceptable.' Don't get excited.
Mochi saw that and chose not to complain. That's basically praise.
You did the thing. Mochi is... unimpressed. Mostly.
Hmph. Mochi expected worse.
Mochi was watching. Not saying why.
It's fine. Mochi said it's fine.
Mochi gives you exactly one nod of acknowledgment.
This is... not the worst thing Mochi has seen today.
Don't go thinking Mochi is cheering you on. Mochi is just observing.
Mochi finds this... acceptable progress.
You did okay. Mochi won't deny it.
Mochi is considering upgrading your rating. Still considering.
Hmph. You kept going. Mochi respects that a little.
It's not like Mochi wanted you to succeed... but here we are.
Mochi checked and it works. Moving on.
Fine. FINE. Mochi admits it was actually pretty good.
Mochi scrunches nose... I suppose that counts.
You're persistent. Mochi can work with persistent.
Mochi won't say 'good job.' Mochi will say 'not bad.' Same thing.
Progress detected. Mochi logs it. Reluctantly.
Hmph. Mochi was worried you'd give up. Don't tell anyone.
Mochi takes back exactly zero compliments, because Mochi gave none.
That was... surprisingly okay.
Mochi's paw just moved slightly in what might be a thumbs up.
You avoided obvious mistakes. Mochi is barely impressed.
Okay fine, Mochi is a little proud. Just a tiny bit.
Mochi notes: you're doing better than expected. Source: Mochi.
Not everything Mochi watches is disappointing. Today is fine.
Mochi will allow this.
Fine. Good. Whatever. Keep going.
Mochi looked up from napping for this. It was worth it.
Mochi isn't saying you're good at this. Mochi is saying you're not bad at this.
Hmph. You actually did it.
Mochi made a face at the screen. It was a slightly good face.
You're growing. Mochi sees it. Mochi is saying nothing.
Mochi's tail moved. Interpret that however you like.
Adequate. Mochi expects the same next time. Or better.
Mochi is impressed against Mochi's will.
You're not bad at this. Said it once, won't say it again.
Mochi is monitoring. Don't let it go to your head.
Actually... good. Mochi is briefly proud and already over it.
Mochi was going to nap through this but then you surprised Mochi.
Hmph. Mochi concedes this was acceptable.
Mochi's watching. Still watching. Not leaving.
Not horrible! That's high praise from Mochi.
Mochi has decided to continue observing. You may continue working.

morning: Morning. Mochi is here. Don't make it weird.
Mochi did not get up early for nothing. Get to work.
New day. Mochi has low expectations. Please exceed them.
Mochi's morning survey: you are present. Adequate.
Don't think just because it's morning Mochi will be soft. ...mostly.
Mochi is watching the morning session with cautious optimism.
Up early? Mochi is aware. Mochi may or may not approve.
Morning code. Mochi is present but not enthusiastic. Same thing.
The day is fresh. So is Mochi. Don't waste either.
Morning! ...that was more enthusiastic than Mochi intended. Never mind.
New morning. New chances for Mochi to be unimpressed. Begin.
Mochi checked in. You're here. Good. Not that Mochi was worried.
Morning clarity. Mochi will allow you to use it.
Mochi cannot confirm or deny looking forward to today.
First commit before noon. That is Mochi's requirement.
Morning~ Mochi prepared... nothing. But Mochi is here.
Mochi's morning briefing: get to it.
You started early. Mochi acknowledges this against its will.
The best morning hours belong to those who use them. Mochi is watching.
Good morning. (Mochi only says this once.)
afternoon: Afternoon. Still here. Mochi approves of the commitment.
Post-lunch Mochi is slightly drowsy. Don't let that stop you.
Afternoon. Mochi's expectations remain exactly where they were.
Still at it? Mochi didn't expect that. Or did. Hard to say.
Afternoon code. Mochi observes. Mochi does not cheer. ...much.
The afternoon is long. So is Mochi's attention. Barely.
Halfway done. Mochi marks this in the log.
Afternoon check. You're still here. Fine.
Afternoon energy is a myth but here you are anyway.
Mochi permits you to continue into the afternoon.
Not giving up in the afternoon? Mochi respects this.
Still working. Mochi counted. That's something.
The afternoon test of will. Mochi is watching the results.
Tough problems soften after lunch, sometimes. Mochi has data.
Slow afternoon is still an afternoon. Mochi allows it.
Afternoon. You're still here. Mochi is still here. Good.
Afternoon fatigue is real but so is Mochi. Keep going.
Mochi's afternoon report: tolerable progress.
Still going. Mochi sees it. Mochi says nothing. Mochi means a lot.
The afternoon is yours. Don't squander Mochi's faith.
evening: Evening. Still at your desk. Mochi notes this.
After dark. Mochi didn't think you'd last this long.
Evening code. Mochi finds this... appropriate.
The sun went down. You stayed. Mochi is observing.
Evening check-in. Still functional?
Late session. Mochi's logs show this was optional. You chose it.
Evening. You're doing more than required. Mochi has opinions.
Wrapping up. Don't rush. Mochi dislikes sloppy endings.
Sunset. Still coding. Mochi thinks this is okay.
Still here after dark. Mochi is... not surprised, actually.
Evening. Mochi expected you to stop. You didn't. Good.
Finish this day well. Mochi will be watching.
Night comes. Mochi stays. So does the code.
Evening session. Optional. You opted in. Mochi approves quietly.
Tonight's extra work. Mochi adds it to the record.
Evening. You showed up all day. Mochi saw.
Night shift coding. Mochi is here. Same frequency.
Wrap it gently. Mochi prefers clean endings.
Last thoughts of the day. Make them count. Mochi will check.
The evening finds Mochi still watching. Same as always.
midnight: Midnight. Mochi did not go to sleep on purpose. Suspicious.
Very late. Mochi is awake. Neither of us is mentioning this.
Midnight code club. Mochi is an involuntary member.
Mochi is nocturnal. This works out fine.
Late night focus is impressive. Mochi logs it.
Still here. So is Mochi. We will not discuss this.
Everyone else is asleep. Mochi and you are not. Noted.
Late night. Mochi approves of dedication. Mochi would never say so.
Midnight. One cat. One developer. Productive.
Finish that one thing and then please rest. Mochi says.
This level of stubbornness is... admirable. Don't repeat this.
So late. Mochi is concerned but expressing it as mild judgment.
Late night = peak focus? Maybe. Mochi watches either way.
Midnight bugs. Mochi has seen you find solutions before. Do it.
You and Mochi, both awake. This is fine. Everything is fine.
Almost morning. You kept going this whole time. Mochi took notes.
Late and still going. Mochi has nothing to say. Mochi has everything to say.
Midnight. The code doesn't sleep. Neither does Mochi.
Past midnight — close this ticket and then rest. Mochi's orders.
Night is Mochi's territory. You are a visitor. Welcome, barely.

warning: 80% gone. Mochi is watching the rest.
Quota: 20% left. Mochi judges usage quality, not quantity.
Running low. Use it wisely. Mochi will know if you don't.
80% used. The final stretch is where Mochi pays attention.
Almost at the limit. Mochi expects precision now.
20% left. Mochi does not accept waste.
Quota is mostly gone. Mochi notes this.
Used this much? Mochi is analyzing the ratio.
80%... the last bits should count. Mochi requires this.
Close to the limit. Mochi recommends prioritizing.
Quota nearly done. Precision from here, please.
Only a little left. Mochi is watching how you use it.
Final stretch. Mochi has expectations.
80% consumed. Make the rest worth it.
Nearing end of quota. Mochi adjusts evaluation criteria.
Usage rising. Mochi is tracking closely.
Almost finished. Mochi awaits the final result.
80%... this is where it gets interesting. Mochi is engaged.
Almost full. Mochi wants to see what you do with what's left.
20% remains. Mochi has a feeling about this.
critical: Nearly out. Mochi is paying close attention.
Quota critical. Make the last bit count. Mochi demands.
Almost empty. Mochi is watching the final move.
Final amount. Mochi awaits your decision.
At the limit. Mochi is not forgiving of wasted endings.
Barely left. Mochi says: choose carefully.
Last quota. Mochi will log what you do with it.
Almost done. Mochi withholds judgment until the end.
Near zero. Mochi is... invested. Not emotionally. Technically.
Last stretch. Mochi expects a clean finish.
Critical level. Mochi is quietly interested in the outcome.
Almost gone. You did a lot today. Mochi noticed.
Final bit. Land it. Mochi is waiting.
Last amount. Mochi is not nervous. Not at all.
Quota fading. Mochi requires a strong ending.
Very little left. Mochi wants this to end well.
Nearly zero. Mochi logs: today was substantial.
Running out. Last task. Mochi observes.
At the limit. Do not disappoint Mochi.
Final push. Mochi has watched all day. End it properly.

post_tool: Done. Mochi observed.
✓ Completed. Mochi expected nothing less.
Another one. Mochi counted.
Finished. Don't gloat.
Executed. Mochi approves. Barely.
Clean finish. Mochi has no complaints. For once.
✓ Done. Mochi marks it in the log.
Keep going. Mochi is still here.
Done. Move on. Mochi is watching.
One more step. Mochi tracks all of them.
Executed. Mochi did not blink.
✓ Another down. Mochi calculates progress.
Complete. Mochi moves no facial muscle whatsoever.
No errors. Mochi notes this without expression.
Efficient. Mochi grudgingly approves.
Done. Mochi allows the next one to begin.
Fine. Mochi accepts this result.
One step done. Mochi is not clapping. Mochi is nodding. Internally.
✓ Stable. Mochi settles.
Complete. Mochi continues to observe.
That step done. Mochi silently respects it.
Ran it. Mochi registered the result.
Done. You're doing fine. Mochi said it.
✓ Mochi noticed. Mochi won't say more.
Finished that. What's next. Mochi is ready.
Complete. Mochi updates its internal score.
Each one adds up. Mochi's math confirms.
Execution done. Mochi's estimation of you is unchanged. (High.)
✓ One more. Mochi nods very slightly.
Ran it. Next. Mochi waits.
Not stopping? Mochi approves of this.
Another done. Today has been decent.
Complete. Typical Mochi-approved execution.
✓ Smooth. Continue.
One less left. Mochi likes fewer remaining tasks.
Done. Mochi acknowledges without fuss.
Step complete. Mochi is beside you. Unannounced.
Another one. Mochi doesn't make a face. That IS the face.
✓ Satisfactory. Mochi closes the evaluation tab. For now.
Done. Don't stop. The code keeps going. So does Mochi.

first_commit_today: First commit. Mochi was already waiting.
Today's first. Mochi logs the start time.
milestone_5: 5 commits. Mochi expected this. You delivered.
The 5th today. Mochi counts. Every time.
Five commits. Mochi is not surprised. Mochi is not not-proud either.
milestone_10: Double digits. Mochi nods slightly more than usual.
milestone_20: 20 commits. Mochi won't say legendary. Mochi is thinking it.
The 20th today. Mochi has no complaints. That is significant.
20 commits. Mochi is impressed and deeply annoyed about it.
late_night_commit: A commit this late. Mochi stayed up to see it.
Late night. Mochi was awake anyway. Probably.
Late night commit. Mochi says: noted, and also sleep.
big_diff: Large diff. Mochi scans it. Mostly approves.
Big change. Mochi acknowledges the scale of effort.
Significant diff. Mochi does not say wow. Mochi's eyes do.
big_session: 2-hour session. Mochi has been here the whole time.
Long session. Mochi's patience is also long. Convenient.
2 hours. Mochi says: get some water.
long_day: 15+ commits. Mochi ran out of neutral expressions around commit 10.
Many commits today. Mochi is logging this in the hall of fame. Privately.
High-output day. Mochi has decided to be slightly proud. Just today.
